# AFO Mobile Visual Runtime

Version: 0.0.4

Dogfoodma v0.04 preserves the passing cockpit UI from v0.03.1 and adds formal MCP-style manifest routes, resource discovery, prompt discovery, tool schemas, adapter contracts, and smoke receipts.

Live runtime:
https://afo-mobile-visual-runtime.jaredtechfit.workers.dev

New v0.04 routes:
- /mcp/manifest
- /mcp/resources
- /mcp/prompts
- /mcp/tool-schema
- /api/adapters/d1/preview
- /api/adapters/r2/manifest
- /api/adapters/kv/theme
- /api/scene/from-d1
- /api/assets/from-r2
- /api/smoke
- /api/smoke/browser-contract
- /api/receipt/visual

Agents should use /mcp/manifest first, then /mcp/tool-schema, then /mcp/call.
